name: Tyler Clark Golf
about: Tyler Clark Golf is an indoor studio and premier destination for golfers serious about honing their game. They offer premium instruction and club fittings accessible to golfers of all skill levels. The facility combines top-tier instruction with advanced technology, including Full Swing, MLM2 Pro by Rapsodo, Putt Aim, and Air Break, to provide a personalized, data-driven approach to skill development. Located in Justin, Texas, with outdoor lessons available at Wildhorse Golf Club in Denton, the venue aims to foster a local community of passionate golfers through personalized coaching and advanced insights.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium, elite-level technology and data-driven instruction
Personalized coaching from experienced professionals in a world-class environment
Dual-location offering for both indoor and outdoor lesson flexibility

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of alcohol services or BYOB policy

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulator system mentioned for indoor use
Advanced launch monitor and ball tracking system

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't explicitly state whether club rentals are available, but it does offer club fitting services. It's recommended to bring your own clubs for lessons and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There's no mention of food and drink services or BYOB policies on the website. It appears to be focused on golf instruction and practice without dining options.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify typical timing for 18-hole simulations. Session times are primarily listed for lessons: 1-hour individual lessons ($85-$120) and 9-hole playing lessons ($250).

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Tyler Clark Golf offers junior development programs, junior lessons ($120 per hour), and junior camps including a Spring Break Junior Camp, making it kid-friendly.
